children.name: Playbook Template
children.command:
# Check Difference (like Terraform plan)
ansible-playbook -i inventory/hosts.ini playbooks/monitoring.yml --check --diff

# Run the real thing
ansible-playbook -i inventory/hosts.ini playbooks/monitoring.yml

children.name: regen_broker_server
children.command:
cd ~/git/cascadya-project/playbook_ansible/ansible-mosquitto-certificats
export VAULT_ADDR="https://secrets.cascadya.com"
export VAULT_TOKEN="${CASCADYA_VAULT_TOKEN:?CASCADYA_VAULT_TOKEN is not set}"
export ANSIBLE_ROLES_PATH=./roles

ansible-playbook -i inventory/hosts.ini playbooks/regen_broker_server.yml

children.name: regen_edge_clients
children.command:
cd ~/git/cascadya-project/playbook_ansible/ansible-mosquitto-certificats

sudo rm /opt/mosquitto/clients/client.crt

export VAULT_ADDR="https://secrets.cascadya.com"
export VAULT_TOKEN="${CASCADYA_VAULT_TOKEN:?CASCADYA_VAULT_TOKEN is not set}"
export ANSIBLE_ROLES_PATH=./roles

ansible-playbook -i inventory/hosts.ini playbooks/regen_edge_clients.yml --limit edge-local

- Get to directory

children.name: monitoring
children.command:
# go to repo
cd ~/git/cascadya-project/playbook_ansible/ansible-monitoring
chmod 755 .
# Run monitoring playbook
ansible-playbook -i inventory/hosts.ini playbooks/monitoring.yml

#Access database
psql -h 10.42.2.2 -U cascadya -d cascadya_telemetry

# View tables
\dt

children.name: General
children.command:
# Test Wireguard connection with broker (Sender)
mosquitto_sub -h mosquitto.cascadya.internal -p 8883 \
  --cafile ca.crt \
  --cert client.crt \
  --key client.key \
  -t "cascadya/site-001/command/#" -v

# Test Wireguard connection with broker (Receiver)
mosquitto_pub -h mosquitto.cascadya.internal -p 8883 \
  --cafile ca.crt \
  --cert client.crt \
  --key client.key \
  -t "cascadya/site-001/command/setpoint" \
  -m '{"power_kw": 500, "timestamp": "2026-02-27T10:00:00Z"}'


# Sync VM scripts
rsync -avz -e "ssh -i ~/.ssh/id_ed25519" ~/git/cascadya-project/Mosquitto\ Scripts/Full\ System/VM\ Broker/ ubuntu@51.15.64.139:~/nats_bridge/

children.name: Documentation
children.command:
# List all the containers (Name, Image, Status)
docker ps -a --format "table {{.Names}}\t{{.Image}}\t{{.Status}}\t{{.Ports}}"

# Identify the volumes
docker volume ls

# Inspect the bind mounts
docker inspect $(docker ps -q) | grep -i "mounts" -A 10

# Inspect tree structure of VM
tree /home/ubuntu/ /etc/mosquitto/ -L 2

# Check Permission of scripts
ls -la /home/ubuntu/python_scripts/

# Listen to Mosquitto Port
ss -tunlp | grep 8883
children.description:
# Containers
NAMES              IMAGE                 STATUS      PORTS
traefik_gateway    traefik:v2.10         Up 4 days   0.0.0.0:80->80/tcp, [::]:80->80/tcp, 0.0.0.0:443->443/tcp, [::]:443->443/tcp, 0.0.0.0:8883->8883/tcp, [::]:8883->8883/tcp
mosquitto_broker   eclipse-mosquitto:2   Up 2 days   1883/tcp

* Conteneur traefik_gateway. Écoute sur les ports 80, 443, et 8883 (MQTT TLS)
* Conteneur mosquitto_broker. Reçoit le trafic de Traefik sur le port interne 1883
* Fichier de configuration situé sur la VM dans /opt/mosquitto/config/mosquitto.conf
* Générés par Ansible, stockés dans /home/ubuntu/ (ca.crt, server.crt, server.key)
* Situés dans /home/ubuntu/python_scripts/ (dispatch_private.py, dispatch_public.py)
* Utilisation de traefik-gateway_mosquitto_data et traefik-gateway_mosquitto_log


# Volumes
DRIVER    VOLUME NAME
local     VOL_DATA
local     VOL_LOG
local     traefik-gateway_mosquitto_data
local     traefik-gateway_mosquitto_log
local     vernemq-data
local     vernemq_data
local     vernemq_etc
local     vernemq_log

# Bind Mounts
        "Mounts": [
            {
                "Type": "bind",
                "Source": "/var/run/docker.sock",
                "Destination": "/var/run/docker.sock",
                "Mode": "ro",
                "RW": false,
                "Propagation": "rprivate"
            }
        ],
        "Config": {
--
        "Mounts": [
            {
                "Type": "bind",
                "Source": "/opt/mosquitto/config/mosquitto.conf",
                "Destination": "/mosquitto/config/mosquitto.conf",
                "Mode": "ro",
                "RW": false,
                "Propagation": "rprivate"
            },
            {
                "Type": "bind",

children.name: General
children.command:
# start wsl
wsl -d ubuntu

# edit the systemd configuration for automated script
sudo nano /etc/systemd/system/dispatch_private.service

# pause the script
sudo systemctl stop dispatch_private.service

# hard killswitch
sudo systemctl disable --now dispatch_private.service

# turn back on
sudo systemctl enable --now dispatch_private.service

# Quick view without editing
systemctl cat dispatch_private.service

children.name: Launch Python Scripts
children.command:
# send_telemetry to Thingsboard (WSL -> Traefik -> Mosquitto -> Thingsboard)
cd ~/git/cascadya-project/"Mosquitto Scripts"/"Test WSL-Edge"
source ../venv/bin/activate
sudo chmod 644 /opt/mosquitto/clients/client.key
sudo chmod 644 /opt/mosquitto/clients/client.crt

# WSL -> Traefik -> Mosquitto -> Thingsboard
python3 send_telemetry_from_WSL_to_Thingsboard.py

# Thingsboard RPC -> Mosquitto -> WSL
python3 receive_telemetry_from_Thingsboard_to_WSL.py



# WSL 1-> Broker -> WSL 2
cd ~/git/cascadya-project/cascadya-edge-os-images/ansible/roles/edge-agent/files/src/test/cloud
cd ~/git/cascadya-project/cascadya-edge-os-images/ansible/roles/edge-agent/files/src/test/client
source ../venv/bin/activate
python3 mqtt_send_test.py
python3 mqtt_receive_ack.py

# WSL(sender) -> Traefik -> Mosquitto(dispatcher) -> Client A + Client B (Public IP)
cd ~/git/cascadya-project/"Mosquitto Scripts"/"Test Topic Concept Public Network"
source ../venv/bin/activate
python3 client_A.py
python3 client_B.py
python3 dispatcher.py
python3 sender.py



# WSL(sender) -> Traefik -> Mosquitto(dispatcher) -> Client A + Client B (Wireguard)
cd ~/git/cascadya-project/"Mosquitto Scripts"/"Test Topics Concept VPN"
source ../venv/bin/activate
python3 universal_client.py
python3 dispatcher.py
python3 sender.py
children.description:
Achieved

1. WSL -> Traefik -> Mosquitto -> Thingsboard
2. WSL(sender) -> Traefik -> Mosquitto(dispatcher) -> Client A + Client B (2 topics differentes sur 2 sites differentes)
3. Thingsboard RPC -> Mosquitto -> WSL

children.name: General
children.command:
#Connect to Industrial PC
ssh cascadya@192.168.10.109

#Connect to Simulator Modbus after Industrial PC
ssh cascadya@192.168.50.2

#Connect with Jump
ssh -J cascadya@192.168.10.109 cascadya@192.168.50.2

#sync files through SSH to Simulator Modbus
rsync -avz -e "ssh -J cascadya@192.168.10.109" ~/git/cascadya-project/Mosquitto\ Scripts/Full\ System/Modbus\ Simulator/ cascadya@192.168.50.2:~/simulator_sbc/

#sync files through SSH to Indusrial PC
rsync -avz ~/git/cascadya-project/Mosquitto\ Scripts/Full\ System/Industrial\ PC/ cascadya@192.168.10.109:~/python_scripts/

#Edit service file
sudo nano /etc/systemd/system/cascadya-gateway.service

# Reload systemctl daemon
sudo systemctl daemon-reload

# Check service status
sudo systemctl status cascadya-gateway.service

sudo systemctl stop cascadya-telemetry.service
sudo systemctl start cascadya-telemetry.service
sudo systemctl status cascadya-telemetry.service

# Check logs

#Connect with Jump

#sync files through SSH to Simulator Modbus
syncproject
